name: EcoClaw Runtime Optimizer
description: Token-efficiency runtime plugin for OpenClaw with pluggable routing and optimization hooks.
author: EcoClaw

proxyBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible proxy base URL for routing (for example: http://127.0.0.1:8787/v1).

proxyApiKey.description: Optional API key used with proxyBaseUrl.

runtimeMode.description: Plugin runtime mode. shadow = run EcoClaw pipeline side-by-side for tracing/fork simulation.

stateDir.description: Directory for EcoClaw runtime state and summaries (default: ~/.openclaw/ecoclaw-plugin-state).

eventTracePath.description: JSONL output path for event trace export.

autoForkOnPolicy.description: Enable connector-level auto fork when policy emits fork recommendation.

summaryTriggerInputTokens.description: Policy threshold (cumulative input tokens per session) for requesting summary.

summaryTriggerStableChars.description: Optional policy threshold based on stable context chars (0 disables char-based trigger).

summaryRecentTurns.description: How many recent raw turns to include in summary payload.

maxSummaryChars.description: Maximum summary chars persisted into memory-state.

compactionPrompt.description: Prompt text for context checkpoint compaction style.

resumePrefixPrompt.description: Prefix prompt used when seeding a forked session from summary.

cacheProbeEnabled.description: Enable passive cache probe policy state machine (warm/uncertain/cold).

cacheProbeIntervalSeconds.description: Minimum interval between planned probe turns.

cacheProbeMaxPromptChars.description: Only short prompts are allowed to be used as low-cost probe turns.

cacheProbeHitMinTokens.description: cacheRead >= this value counts as probe hit.

cacheProbeMissesToCold.description: Consecutive probe misses required to mark cache state as cold.

cacheProbeWarmSeconds.description: Probe hit freshness window for warm state.

debugTapProviderTraffic.description: Debug only: tap outbound provider fetch requests/responses and write JSONL records.

debugTapPath.description: Path for provider traffic tap JSONL output.
